'''Edan tigers''', also known as '''snowcats''', were large predatory felines native to the colder regions of [[Edan II/Legends|Edan II]]. They were covered from head to spined-tail in white fur with black stripes which helped conceal them in their natural habitat, both during warmer weather and the colder snow-covered months. They had two very large fangs that protruded from either side of their top row of teeth.

==Appearances==
*''[[Introductory Adventure Game]]''
